🇵🇸 Government Media Office in Gaza: 

The "israeli" occupation army has returned fuel shipments destined for hospitals in Gaza and the northern region for the fifth consecutive time, leaving all hospitals and Ministry of Health facilities at risk of shutting down within less than 24 hours.

The "israeli" occupation army has blocked the diesel fuel delivery to hospitals in Gaza and Northern Gaza governorates for the fifth time in a row. This means that all hospitals and Ministry of Health facilities are at risk of ceasing operations in less than 24 hours, as the available fuel will not last more than 24 hours, and some facilities have already run out.

We are witnessing a fully-fledged crime being executed by the occupation army aimed at destroying and collapsing the healthcare system, especially in Gaza and the northern governorates. This crime is taking place in the midst of a dire health situation in these governorates, which are home to 700,000 people.

We hold the "israeli" occupation and the American administration fully responsible for the continued, deliberate targeting of the healthcare system, following a premeditated plan devised by both parties.

We call on the international community and all UN and international organizations to urgently intervene and ensure the immediate delivery of fuel to the governorates before all hospitals and Ministry of Health facilities in Gaza and the northern governorates are forced to cease operations.

Government Media Office
Gaza Strip - Palestine
Thursday, October 10, 2024

🔴@haqqintel

🇱🇧 Hezbollah | Statement issued by the Islamic Resistance Operations Room:

- The Islamic Resistance confirms what was issued by the Deputy Secretary-General of Hezbollah, His Eminence Sheikh Naim Qassem, regarding the readiness of the missile force to target every place in occupied Palestine decided by the leadership of the resistance through the command and control system that has returned stronger and more solid than it was previously.

- The persistence of the "israeli" enemy in attacking our honourable people in all parts of steadfast Lebanon will make Haifa and cities other than Haifa for resistance rockets akin to Kiryat Shmona, Metula, and other border settlements with Lebanon, and this is what the enemy and its settlers witnessed in Haifa and its surroundings today, Tuesday.

- The Islamic Resistance sees and hears where this enemy does not expect, and its hand is capable of reaching wherever it wants in occupied Palestine, and its attacks towards the Zionist depth will not be limited to missiles or suicide drones.

- Our brave Mujahideen continue to confront all attempts by the elite Zionist soldiers to advance and occupy some of the southern villages on the front line with occupied Palestine, in a heroic epic that this enemy has never known in its wars, to the point that it has begun to hide behind UNIFIL positions and in paths invisible to the Lebanese side, and it has not succeeded until now in entering our steadfast villages, and it is suffering heavy losses exceeding 35 dead and 200 wounded from its elite officers and soldiers.

- We repeat what we said in the first days of this heroic epic, that what this enemy is witnessing from our Mujahideen is only some of the severe might that awaits it wherever its feet tread in southern Lebanon.

- We say to our honourable people, you are in the conscience of every fighter among us, you are our great strength that humiliates this enemy, you are the cries of Takbir in the field and you are the prayer of victory with which we draw closer to Allah, O our people, you are the secret of our steadfastness, our pride and all the victories, we know that you are the people of patience, sacrifice, and loyalty, from you we derive all our determination and strength, and with your prayers, we sharpen our resolve and fight with pride.

- As for beloved Gaza, we say, we are committed to the covenant and promise and will not abandon our support and backing for our steadfast Palestinian people in the Gaza Strip and their valiant and honourable resistance, this is the will of the Master of the Martyrs of the Path to Al-Quds (may his soul rest in peace) and it is a trust in our necks, and we are the people of the trust, God willing, until our last breath.

🔴@haqqintel

🇱🇧 Statement Issued by Hezbollah on the Anniversary of Al-Aqsa Flood:

Today marks the one-year anniversary of the heroic Al-Aqsa Flood operation, which highlighted the determination of the Palestinian resistance in standing against the aggression, injustice, and occupation that has oppressed the Palestinian people since 1948, along with the wars, tragedies, and destruction that followed.

This operation will have profound historical and strategic consequences for the region, continuing until justice is achieved and the occupation is removed, allowing the Palestinian people to reclaim their legitimate rights to their land, from the river to the sea.

On this historic occasion, we emphasize the following:

 1. The Palestinian people have the full right to resist the occupation by any means necessary to restore their legitimate rights and eliminate the occupation.

 2. Despite the brutality of the occupation and its aggression, which has resulted in the martyrdom of tens of thousands of Palestinians and unprecedented destruction in Gaza, this unjust and aggressive entity has proven fragile, unable to survive without American support.

 3. There is no place for this temporary zionist entity in our region or within our social, cultural, and human fabric. It remains a malignant, aggressive tumor that must be removed, no matter how long it takes.

 4. The United States, along with its global and regional allies and tools, are complicit in this occupation’s aggression and crimes against the Palestinian, Lebanese, and regional peoples. They bear full responsibility for the killing, injustice, and horrific humanitarian tragedies.

 5. We commend the steadfastness of the Palestinian people and their valiant resistance over the past year, despite the tragedies and suffering they have endured. Their patience, endurance, and heroism make them deserving of victory.

 6. We praise the courage and strength of our brothers, the fighters on the support fronts in Yemen and Iraq, as well as the historic decision by the Islamic Republic of Iran to strike deep into the heart of the occupying entity with missiles in support of the Palestinian and Lebanese people. This decision has had significant effects on the nature of the ongoing confrontation with the zionist enemy.

 7. Hezbollah’s decision to open the support front on October 8, in solidarity with the Palestinian people and their honorable resistance, is a stance for justice and humanity. It is also a decision to defend Lebanon and its people, for which our resistance and our people have paid a heavy price—both in leadership, military, and material resources, and through the forced displacement of hundreds of thousands of civilians and the widespread destruction of property. The enemy continues its crimes and aggression without restraint, but we are confident, with Allah’s will, in our resistance’s ability to repel this aggression. We believe in our people’s strength to endure until this hardship is lifted. After difficulty comes ease, and after distress comes relief. The era of defeats is over, and Allah’s victory has arrived.

🔴@haqqintel

In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

On the side of His Eminence, Grand Ayatollah Leader Imam Sayyed Ali Khamenei (may his shadow endure)

May God’s peace, mercy, and blessings be upon you

On behalf of Hezbollah, its Mujahideen, the families of its martyrs and its wounded, and the general public of the resistance in Lebanon, I extend to you my deepest condolences and feelings of sympathy on the occasion of the martyrdom of this group of righteous leaders, led by His Eminence Ayatollah Sayyid Ibrahim Raisi, the Mujahid, servant and loyal President of the Islamic Republic, and his Minister of Foreign Affairs, the dear brother Dr. Hussein Amirabdullahian, the bearer of the banner of defending the resistance in all international forums, His Eminence Ayatollah Al Hashem, your representative in East Azerbaijan, its governor, Mr. Rahmati, and their comrades who were with them.

We share with you all the feelings and meanings of the loss of these honourable leaders at this sensitive stage as you lead the Islamic nation in its bitter struggle with the forces of arrogance and hegemony and the American and Zionist occupation of our sanctities, our countries, and our peoples.

May God bless all of these good martyrs with His vast mercy and gather them with our masters, the Messenger of God and his pure family, may God’s prayers be upon them all.

Monday 11 Dhul-Qi’dah 1445 AH

🇵🇸 Statement by the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine regarding the death of the Iranian President, Foreign Minister, and their companions ⬇️

The Popular Front mourns Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi and his companions and affirms its confidence that Iran will overcome this ordeal.

With hearts filled with pain and sorrow, the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine received the news of the passing of Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi, Foreign Minister Hossein Amir Abdollahian, and other officials due to the crash of a helicopter carrying them in East Azerbaijan Province in northwestern Iran Sunday evening.

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, on behalf of its Secretary-General, his deputy, all its members, and the entire Palestinian people, extends its deepest condolences to the Iranian people and their leadership for this great loss and tragic accident.

The Popular Front commends the late Iranian president, affirming that he dedicated his life to serving his country and working throughout his years in office to advance the Islamic Republic on all levels, contributing to its transformation into a significant and influential regional power.

He also made significant efforts in supporting the Palestinian cause and the Palestinian resistance, particularly in the Al-Aqsa Flood battle. 

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine expresses its full solidarity and support with the Iranian people and their leadership, confident that the Islamic Republic of Iran will overcome this ordeal and fill the substantial void left by the president and the other officials, for Iran has the constitution and leadership to compensate for this significant loss.

The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine 
Central Media Department 
May 20, 2024

In the Name of God, the Compassionate, the Merciful

Surely we belong to God and to Him we shall return

With deep sorrow and regret, I have received the bitter news of the martyrdom-like demise of the mujahid scholar, the people's President, the competent, hard-working servant of Imam Reza (pbuh), Hujjat al-Islam wal-Muslimeen, Haj Sayyid Ebrahim Raisi and his esteemed entourage (may God be pleased with them). Our honorable Raisi worked tirelessly. In this bitter tragedy, the Iranian nation lost a devoted, sincere, valuable individual who served their country. In times of genocide in Gaza and the assassinations and massacres and widespread land confiscation in the West Bank, it is hard for popular mobilization to delve into talking about the conditions of the heroes of the struggle or to draw lessons from them... 🇵🇸 Comrade Georges Abdallah’s letter for Palestinian Prisoners' Day (1/2):

Dear Comrades, Dear Friends,

These days, many are celebrating Palestinian Prisoners' Day through initiatives similar to yours, commemorating the martyrdom of Walid Daqqah. This symbolic figure from the icons of the Palestinian resistance who never surrendered or faltered in any way throughout decades of captivity, defying torture, deprivation, isolation, and illness, in addition to the banning of his messages and writings.

Last year, on this very occasion, Walid was still steadfast in his solitary cell; his will unshakable, despite being deprived of all necessary medical care. Some of you still remember various expressions of solid support for him and other fighters detained in zionist prisons, particularly the calls and invitations to support him, especially the ongoing militant initiatives at that time, aiming to extricate Comrade Walid, whose health situation was dire, from the clutches of his criminal jailers. Unfortunately, all our efforts were not enough to overcome the stubbornness of Ben-Gvir and their accomplices among the jailers and judges. Death by denial of medical care is now the master of the situation in various zionist prisons, especially the Naqab prison where the abductees of Gaza are held.

It might be useful to remind ourselves, dear comrades, that if the Palestinian National Council had designated April 17th as "Palestinian Prisoners' Day" in 1974, it was not only to denounce the barbarity of the zionist occupier on this occasion, nor just to honor the captive resistance fighters by reminding the popular masses of their sacrifices and concessions or their unshakable will in facing the zionist military. Celebrating Prisoners' Day aims above all to affirm loudly and clearly our duties towards our imprisoned comrades, and foremost among all, to include their liberation in the general dynamics of our ongoing struggles. Celebrating Palestinian Prisoners' Day aims above all, dear comrades, to call and encourage the living forces of the revolution and its fighting vanguards to implement all necessary measures to practically express our firm resolve to liberate our comrades from the clutches of their criminal jailers.

Our Walid died standing. He remains forever alive in our hearts and in the minds of the masses and fighters participating in this epic of resistance, and he remains forever alive with all those who preceded him or followed him as torches lighting the way of resistance, liberation, freedom, and emancipation.

In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

In the name of the Lord of the screaming launchers. In the name of the Lord of the fighters. In the name of the Lord of those who crossed like a thread of sunshine on the day they crossed on the seventh of October, trampling on necks and achieving what all Arab countries were unable to achieve in seventy years. In the name of the Lord of those who memorized the Book of God, the pure ones, the ones kneeling and prostrating, who responded to the call within ten minutes before the start of the crossing on the seventh of October, without fear, fright, or hesitation, whose hearts and hands did not tremble, and their eyes did not blink. In the name of the Lord of a thousand and a few fighters, without a fighter excluded. In the name of the Lord of those who, no matter how much the occupation tries, with the crimes and destruction it is committing in the beloved Strip, to cauterize that consciousness and erase it from the imagination of children before adults, the image of the clear victory that was achieved within four hours of the entry of the [resistance’s] elite. Only four hours that the world will stand before it for a long time in research and analysis, how the invincible army evaporated with its planes, tanks, and equipment. 

In the name of the Lord of the fighters who have not left their tunnels for seven months. In the name of the Lord of their elite. In the name of the Lord of their fighters, their soldiers and their leaders. In the name of the Lord of their missiles, strikes, and ambushes that hurt, pained, destroyed, and conquered a country–and behind it countries–that believed that in a few days the Gaza Strip would be surrendered, or that these men would surrender it. But far from it, far from it. These men did not rely on those who were unjust. Rather, they relied and put their trust in the Lord of Glory, a mighty Lord. Neither their strength nor their resolve failed. 

Our great people in all parts of the land, from the West Bank to Gaza to the interior, to the diaspora and the diaspora camps:

This is a brief statement from the Lions' Den groups to every Palestinian wherever they are. We say to you, our beloved ones, the most honorable people, the purest people, and the greatest people,

The Den swore by Allah Almighty, and it swears by Allah Almighty, that the rifle will not be abandoned until the last fighter. We promised you, and we pledge to you, that we will remain as you promised us, racing in jihad, in fighting, and in avenging the free and honorable women. 

We chose and decided more than five months ago to remain silent in the face of the greatness of the resistance in Gaza, in the face of the greatness of its strikes, and in the face of the greatness of what it did and is doing, and the campaigns of arrests and torture from all sides, and the campaigns of mutilation, even of the martyrs in their graves, and even of the great leaders. 

In the face of all of that, we preferred to remain silent, but by Allah, our guns have never been silent, and our lions roar every day and every hour. The Lions’ Den groups have carried out during this period dozens of shootings in the West Bank without an announcement, and we still insist that the statements remain silent and that the talking be left to the guns.

And to the [neurotic] deluded people, we say to you, delusional is the one who thinks that the resistance in the West Bank will end. Delusional is the one who thinks he can end the Jenin Brigade. Delusional are the ones who think or thought that they can end the Tulkarem Brigade, or any of the brigades or groups that launched in the West Bank, and delusional –by Allah, by Allah, by Allah– are those who planned, met, conspired, communicated, threatened, executed, and vowed to end the Lions' Den groups. By Allah, we only increased strength, steadfastness and numbers.

🇵🇸 The General Union of Palestinian Writers and Authors released a statement mourning the loss of the martyred prisoner Walid Daqqa ⬇️ 

The General Union of Palestinian Writers and Authors mourns the imprisoned writer and activist Walid Daqqa, who was martyred today, Sunday, in Assaf Harofeh prison, after a long journey of national struggle that concluded with years of detention in which he faced the brutality of the prison guard and diseases resulting from medical negligence.

The Secretary-General of the Union, poet Murad Al-Sudani, expressed his deep sadness and the Palestinian cultural movement’s loss of literary and militant value and stature that deserved the respect of the nation and its people. He spent his life for the freedom of his people.

Al-Sudani said: “We had repeatedly warned of the execution of the prisoner thinker Walid Daqqa by the Zionist prisoner, and we have always called, through the union’s statements, sit-ins and appeals, for local, Arab and international bodies, centres, and parties to put pressure on the occupation prison authorities to provide the necessary medical service to the prisoner Daqqa, and to quickly release him for health reasons.” However, what we warned about happened unfortunately, and today we bid farewell to the writer and thinker Walid Daqqa, at a stage when the homeland is exposed to a fierce aggressive attack and a genocidal war in the Gaza Strip and all of Palestine.

As we bid farewell to the martyr Walid Daqqa, who spent 38 years in detention, we call on the concerned international authorities to bring those responsible for Daqqa’s martyrdom to the international court and to bring the criminals accountable and punished.

We also extend our sincere condolences and sympathy from the family of the thinker Walid Daqqa and from all our people, writers, writers and fans, wishing him mercy and forgiveness.

🇱🇧🚨 Hezbollah issued the following correction for an operation conducted at 20:50 today in Lebanon’s Easton Sector. 

“CLARIFICATION: The armed drone belonging to the enemy ‘israeli’ army, which was shot down by the Mujahideen of the Islamic Resistance on Saturday evening, 04/06/2024, over Lebanese territory, is a Hermes 900.”

A little information about the Elbit Systems’ Hermes 900 ⬇️ 

♦️ The Hermes 900 is a medium-size, multi-payload, medium-altitude long-endurance (MALE) unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV). It is the successor to the Hermes 450 which Hezbollah has previously succeeded in neutralizing. 

♦️ The UAVs first flight occurred on 9 December, 2009 and was introcudec publicly in 2012. The IOF first used the drone in combat during the 2014 war on Gaza. 

♦️ Takeoff weight: 1,180Kg (more than double the weight of the Hermes 450), Max payload: 350Kg (including standard and long-range electro-optical/infrared, synthetic aperture radar/ground-moving target indication, communications and electronic intelligence, electronic warfare, and hyperspectral sensors, enabling the UAV to achieve persistent wide-area surveillance.), Endurance up to 36 hours, Service ceiling 30,000ft (9144m),  • Maximum speed: 220 km/h (140 mph, 120 kn)Cruise speed: 112 km/h (70 mph, 60 kn), operational rage of over 1,000km

♦️ Elbit Systems said that the Hermes 900 had the “first ever dual military and civilian certifications for a UAS, can also perform ground support and maritime patrol missions for both naval customers and civilian government agencies.”

♦️ Per Janes: the Hermes 900 ranges in price between $5.83 million USD and $6.85 million USD per unit.
